title: Brathflen Corporation's Medcenter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Brathflen Corporation's Medcenter''' was a [[Medcenter/Legends|medcenter]] built by [[Brathflen Corporation]] in [[Plawal Rift]], [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]].

==Appearances==
